summary: SSE text streaming fix VERIFIED. All features working correctly. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: Streaming text renders in real-time (word by word), tool activity indicators (Thinking, Saving word) appear above streaming text, typing indicator shows initially then transitions to streaming text when text_delta arrives, final message renders with tool_activity summary.

tests: Typing indicator (three dots) appears initially while waiting for text_delta events
Tool activity indicators (Thinking, Saving word to vocabulary) render above streaming bubble
Streaming text bubble appears with data-testid='streaming-message' when text_delta arrives
Streaming text renders in real-time word by word (verified 20+ state captures)
MarkdownContent renders formatted text in streaming bubble (bold, italics working)
After SSE done event, streaming bubble transitions to final saved AI message
Tool activity summary (X tools used) shows on final AI message
Chat input works correctly in text mode
Play audio buttons present on AI messages

event_sequence: 3. text_delta events stream content token by token
4. done event with user_message, ai_message, ai_audio_base64

verified_fix_details.original_bug: Nothing was being streamed - only three dots loader appeared
verified_fix_details.root_cause_1: text_delta SSE events were explicitly dropped with comment 'Don't show streaming text'
verified_fix_details.root_cause_2: streamingText was never rendered in MessageList
verified_fix_details.root_cause_3: No streaming AI bubble existed in UI
fix_applied: ChatPage.js line 215: text_delta events now accumulate into streamingText state
MessageList.jsx lines 122-144: Streaming AI bubble renders MarkdownContent from streamingText
Tool events use flushSync for immediate render, text_delta uses normal setState
requestAnimationFrame used to transition from streaming to final message

critical_code_review_comments: CORRECT: text_delta events properly accumulated into streamingText state
CORRECT: Streaming bubble uses MarkdownContent for formatted rendering
CORRECT: TypingIndicator shown when sending=true but streamingText is empty
CORRECT: ToolActivityLive renders tool events above streaming bubble
CORRECT: requestAnimationFrame used to ensure smooth transition to final message
seed_data_creation: Test conversation created/cleaned by pytest fixture
context_for_next_testing_agent: SSE text streaming is fully working. Key verification: 1) Backend emits text_delta events correctly (verified via curl and pytest), 2) Frontend accumulates text_deltas into streamingText state, 3) MessageList renders streaming bubble with MarkdownContent when streamingText has content, 4) Typing indicator shows while waiting for text. The Playwright test captured 20+ streaming states confirming real-time text rendering works.
